CONF Stock Rise June 10 2024

Shares of CONF jumped 9% on June 10, 2024 following reports of a major acquisition deal.

However, a later statement from the company disputed these reports as erroneous and misreported. The company issued a correction stating that no acquisition discussions were underway.

The price move remains unexplained by any confirmed corporate event. Analysts noted the move may have been driven by incorrect rumors that were subsequently retracted.
